0
Notifications

Dev Release 36! 📈

Today, we're diving into the groundbreaking offchain implementation of Proof of Work (PoW) using a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) for our blockchain. This innovative approach promises to enhance scalability and performance like never before. But that's not all! We also have an exhilarating update on the X1 Miner application – we're kickstarting the development of new modules that will take user engagement to the next level.

Check out your Dev Release 36 for more details!

May 22 at 9:15 PM

Dashboard Upgrade, We've added your ROI % Calculator!

We've simplified projecting your BDAG holdings' value with our new ROI calculator on our dashboard's calculator section.

Imagine this: if BDAG hits $10 in 2025, and you buy $1,000 worth of BDAG today at $0.0085, your investment could balloon to a massive $1.17 million USD! That's an incredible 11,700% increase! Similar growth has been achieved by some of the most famous coins on the market, and with the momentum BDAG has already gained, it could very well happen again!

Simply click ROI Calculator in the menu and explore!

May 21 at 8:00 PM

  • Buy Now
  • ROI Calculator

  • Transactions

Welcome to BlockDAG Dashboard! 👋

0
Notifications

Dev Release 36! 📈

Today, we're diving into the groundbreaking offchain implementation of Proof of Work (PoW) using a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) for our blockchain. This innovative approach promises to enhance scalability and performance like never before. But that's not all! We also have an exhilarating update on the X1 Miner application – we're kickstarting the development of new modules that will take user engagement to the next level.

Check out your Dev Release 36 for more details!

May 22 at 9:15 PM

Dashboard Upgrade, We've added your ROI % Calculator!

We've simplified projecting your BDAG holdings' value with our new ROI calculator on our dashboard's calculator section.

Imagine this: if BDAG hits $10 in 2025, and you buy $1,000 worth of BDAG today at $0.0085, your investment could balloon to a massive $1.17 million USD! That's an incredible 11,700% increase! Similar growth has been achieved by some of the most famous coins on the market, and with the momentum BDAG has already gained, it could very well happen again!

Simply click ROI Calculator in the menu and explore!
